debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝ : CommRing R
ι : Type
I : ι → Ideal R
⊢ Injective ⇑(@Ideal.chineseMap R inst✝ ι I)

proof:
intro x y h
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem]
  rw [chineseMap_mk, chineseMap_mk] at h
  have h' : ∀ i : ι, Quotient.mk (I i) x' = Quotient.mk (I i) y' := by
    intro i
    have := congrArg (fun f => f i) h
    simpa using this
  have hxmem : ∀ i : ι, x' - y' ∈ I i := by
    intro i
    simpa [Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem] using h' i
  exact mem_iInf.2 hxmem

intro x y h
  rcases Ideal.Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rcases Ideal.Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩
  rw [Ideal.Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem]
  have h' : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) x') = chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y') := h
  have h0 : chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (x' - y')) = 0 := by
    simpa [map_sub] using congrArg (fun z => z - chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y')) h'
  rw [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at h0
  exact h0

intro x y h
  refine Quotient.inductionOn₂ x y ?_ 
  intro a b hab
  apply Quotient.eq.2
  rw [Quotient.lift_mk] at hab
  change Pi.ringHom (fun i : ι ↦ Quotient.mk (I i)) a = Pi.ringHom (fun i : ι ↦ Quotient.mk (I i)) b at hab
  have hab' : a - b ∈ ker (Pi.ringHom fun i : ι ↦ Quotient.mk (I i)) := by
    rw [mem_ker]
    simpa [map_sub] using congrArg (fun f => f - f) hab
  have : a - b ∈ ⨅ i, I i := by
    simpa [ker_Pi_Quotient_mk] using hab'
  simpa [Ideal.Quotient.eq] using this
simpa [mem_ker] using congrArg (fun z => z) hx)

  have hmem : x' - y' ∈ ker (chineseMap I) := by
    simpa [Ideal.mem_ker] using h0
  have hker : ker (chineseMap I) = ⨅ i, I i := by

  have : x' - y' ∈ ⨅ i, I i := by

    exact (injective_iff_map_eq_zero (f := chineseMap I)).1

  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩

intro x y h
  -- use `injective_iff_map_eq_zero` on the quotient map from `R ⧸ ⨅ i, I i`
  -- via the characterization of its kernel as `⨅ i, I i`
  apply Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem.2
  -- `x - y` is in the kernel of `chineseMap I`, hence in `⨅ i, I i`
  -- and the kernel is exactly `⨅ i, I i` by construction
  -- so it suffices to show `chineseMap I (x - y) = 0`
  have : chineseMap I (x - y) = 0 := by
    simpa [map_sub] using congrArg (fun z => z - chineseMap I y) h
  -- now unravel the kernel condition for the lift: it is `⨅ i, I i`
  -- and use `Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem`
  -- choose representatives of `x` and `y`
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩
  -- compute in terms of representatives
  change x' - y' ∈ ⨅ i, I i
  -- from `chineseMap` equality to zero, get coordinatewise membership
  have h0 : (fun i : ι => Quotient.mk (I i) (x' - y')) = 0 := by
    simpa [chineseMap_mk, map_sub] using this
  -- membership in infimum is pointwise membership
  refine Ideal.mem_iInf.2 ?_
  intro i
  -- coordinate `i` gives zero in quotient, hence membership in `I i`
  have : Quotient.mk (I i) (x' - y') = 0 := by
    simpa using congrArg (fun f => f i) h0
  simpa [Ideal.Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using this

  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.mk_eq_mk_iff_sub_mem]
  have h' :
      chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) (x' - y')) = 0 := by
    simpa [map_sub, h] using congrArg (fun z => z - chineseMap I (Quotient.mk (⨅ i, I i) y')) h
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] at h' ⊢
  simpa [chineseMap_mk, Pi.sub_apply, Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using h'

rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro x hx
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rw [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem]
  rw [chineseMap_mk] at hx
  change x' ∈ ⨅ i, I i
  refine Ideal.mem_iInf.2 ?_
  intro i
  have hx' : Quotient.mk (I i) x' = 0 := by
    have := congrArg (fun f : (∀ i, R ⧸ I i) => f i) hx
    simpa using this
  simpa [Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem] using hx'
